welcome.title: Welcome to Debezium Platform!
welcome.content: Let's take a quick tour of the platform. You can skip ahead at any time.

sidebarNav.title: Navigation
sidebarNav.content: Use the sidebar to navigate between the main sections: Pipelines, Sources, Transforms, Destinations, Connections, and Vaults.

pipelineNav.title: Pipelines
pipelineNav.content: This is where you manage your data pipelines, the core of the platform.

sourceNav.title: Sources
sourceNav.content: Define source connections to capture data change events from your databases.

destinationNav.title: Destinations
destinationNav.content: Specify where the platform delivers captured data changes.

connectionNav.title: Connections
connectionNav.content: Manage connections to your sources and destinations.

themeSelector.title: Theme
themeSelector.content: Switch between light, dark, or system themes to suit your preference.

addPipeline.title: Create a Pipeline
addPipeline.content: Start by creating your first pipeline to stream change events from a source to a destination.

flowSelector.title: Welcome to the Guided Tour!
flowSelector.description: Choose how you want to explore the platform:
flowSelector.basicDescription: A quick overview of the platform navigation and key sections. Perfect if you want to get started fast.
flowSelector.advancedDescription: A comprehensive walkthrough following the pipeline creation flow. Ideal for first-time users.

advSourceNav.title: Sources
advSourceNav.content: Define source connections to capture data change events from your databases.

advDestinationNav.title: Destinations
advDestinationNav.content: Specify where the platform delivers captured data changes.

advTransformNav.title: Transforms
advTransformNav.content: Click on Transforms in the sidebar to see how data can be transformed in-flight.

advConnectionNav.title: Connections
advConnectionNav.content: Manage connections to your sources and destinations.

advAddPipeline.title: Add a Pipeline
advAddPipeline.content: Click this button to open the Pipeline Designer and start building your first data pipeline.

advDesignerSource.title: Select a Source
advDesignerSource.content: In the Pipeline Designer, start by selecting a source. This determines where your change data events will be captured from.

advDesignerDestination.title: Select a Destination
advDesignerDestination.content: Next, choose a destination where the captured data changes will be delivered.

advDesignerTransform.title: Add Transforms (Optional)
advDesignerTransform.content: Optionally add transforms to modify data as it flows from source to destination. You can reorder or remove them later.

advDbzServerConfig.title: Debezium Server Configuration
advDbzServerConfig.content: Use this to import the Debezium server settings. You can upload an existing configuration to create and auto-populate source, destination, and transform selections.

advConfigurePipeline.title: Configure Pipeline
advConfigurePipeline.content: Once you've selected a source and destination, click here to configure and create your pipeline.

welcome.title: Welcome to Sources
welcome.content: This is the Sources page where you manage your source database connections. Let's walk through the key features.

addSource.title: Add a Source
addSource.content: Click here to browse the source connector catalog and create a new source. You can choose from a variety of database connectors like PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, and more.

welcome.title: Welcome to Destinations
welcome.content: This is the Destinations page where you manage your destination endpoints. Let's walk through the key features.

addDestination.title: Add a Destination
addDestination.content: Click here to browse the destination connector catalog and create a new destination. Choose from streaming platforms like Kafka, Kinesis, Pub/Sub, and more.

smartEditor.title: Create Using Smart Editor
smartEditor.content: Use the Smart Editor to create a destination by directly configuring in JSON. You can also upload an debezium server configuration to create a destination.

search.title: Search Connectors
search.content: Use the search bar to quickly filter destination connectors by name. Helpful when browsing through the available destination types.

kafkaCard.title: Select a Destination
kafkaCard.content: Select a destination from the list below to configure it.

smartEditor.title: Create Using Smart Editor
smartEditor.content: Use the Smart Editor to create a source by directly configuring in JSON. You can also upload an kafka connect based source definition or debezium server configuration to create a source.

search.title: Search Connectors
search.content: Use the search bar to quickly filter connectors by name. Helpful when browsing through the available source types.

postgresqlCard.title: Select a Source
postgresqlCard.content: Select a source from the list below to configure it.

editorToggle.title: Editor Mode
editorToggle.content: Use the Form Editor for a guided, field-by-field setup or switch to the Smart Editor to configure directly in JSON. The Smart Editor is great for pasting existing configurations.

editorToggle.title: Editor Mode
editorToggle.content: Use the Form Editor for a guided, field-by-field setup or switch to the Smart Editor to configure directly in JSON. The Smart Editor is great for pasting existing configurations.
